option.name: filePath
option.value: /ApiGatewayApplication (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /AuthServiceApplication (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /Dockerfile (snapshot)

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-17 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY pom.xml . COPY src ./src
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jdk
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/target/*.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8761
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-17 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN mvn clean install -DskipTests -pl eureka-server
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jdk
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/eureka-server/target/*.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8761
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: filePath
option.value: /JwtAuthenticationFilter (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /JwtService (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /NotificationProducer (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /NotificationServiceApplication (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /RouteConfig (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /V1__init_users (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /V2__seed_admin (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /application (snapshot).yml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
server: port: 8081
spring: application: name: AUTH-SERVICE data: mongodb: uri: mongodb://mongodb:27017/authdb
jwt: secret: "your-very-secure-secret-key-which-is-long" expiration: 900000 # 15 minutes
kafka: bootstrap-servers: kafka:9092
mongock: migration-scan-package: - com.platform.auth.migration enabled: true
eureka: client: service-url: defaultZone: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ register-with-eureka: true fetch-registry: true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
server: port: 8081
spring: application: name: AUTH-SERVICE data: mongodb: uri: mongodb://mongodb:27017/authdb
jwt: secret: "your-very-secure-secret-key-which-is-long" expiration: 900000 # 15 minutes
kafka: bootstrap-servers: kafka:9092 producer: key-serializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer value-serializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonSerializer acks: all retries: 3
mongock: migration-scan-package: - com.platform.auth.migration enabled: true
eureka: client: service-url: defaultZone: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ register-with-eureka: true fetch-registry: true

option.name: filePath
option.value: /docker-compose (snapshot).yml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
version: "3.9"
services:
# ======================= # EUREKA SERVER (Start First) # ======================= eureka-server: build: ./eureka-server container_name: eureka-server ports: - "8761:8761" healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8761/eureka/apps"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5 start_period: 30s
# ======================= # MONGODB # ======================= mongodb: image: mongo:7 container_name: mongodb ports: - "27017:27017" volumes: - mongo_data:/data/db
redis: image: redis:7 container_name: redis ports: - "6379:6379"
# ======================= # KAFKA + ZOOKEEPER # ======================= zookeeper: image: confluentinc/cp-zookeeper:7.5.0 container_name: zookeeper environment: ZOOKEEPER_CLIENT_PORT: 2181 ports: - "2181:2181"
kafka: image: confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.5.0 container_name: kafka depends_on: - zookeeper ports: - "9092:9092" environment: KAFKA_BROKER_ID: 1 KAFKA_ZOOKEEPER_CONNECT: zookeeper:2181 KAFKA_ADVERTISED_LISTENERS: PLAINTEXT://kafka:9092 KAFKA_LISTENERS: PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092 KAFKA_OFFSETS_TOPIC_REPLICATION_FACTOR: 1 KAFKA_AUTO_CREATE_TOPICS_ENABLE: "true"
# ======================= # AUTH SERVICE # ======================= auth-service: build: context: . dockerfile: auth-service/Dockerfile container_name: auth-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8081:8081" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/authdb JWT_SECRET: your-secret-key EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # CATALOGUE SERVICE # ======================= catalogue-service: build: context: . dockerfile: catalogue-service/Dockerfile container_name: catalogue-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8082:8080" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/cataloguedb EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # TICKET SERVICE # ======================= ticket-service: build: context: . dockerfile: ticket-service/Dockerfile container_name: ticket-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8083:8080" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/ticketdb EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # PAYMENT SERVICE # ======================= payment-service: build: context: . dockerfile: payment-service/Dockerfile container_name: payment-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8084:8080" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/paymentdb EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # NOTIFICATION SERVICE # ======================= notification-service: build: context: . dockerfile: notification-service/Dockerfile container_name: notification-service depends_on: - kafka ports: - "8085:8085"
# ======================= # API GATEWAY # ======================= api-gateway: build: context: . dockerfile: api-gateway/Dockerfile container_name: api-gateway depends_on: auth-service: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy catalogue-service: condition: service_started ticket-service: condition: service_started payment-service: condition: service_started ports: - "8080:8080"
volumes: mongo_data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: "3.9"
services:
# ======================= # EUREKA SERVER (Start First) # ======================= eureka-server: build: context: . dockerfile: eureka-server/Dockerfile container_name: eureka-server ports: - "8761:8761" healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8761/eureka/apps"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5 start_period: 30s
# ======================= # MONGODB # ======================= mongodb: image: mongo:7 container_name: mongodb ports: - "27017:27017" volumes: - mongo_data:/data/db
redis: image: redis:7 container_name: redis ports: - "6379:6379"
# ======================= # KAFKA + ZOOKEEPER # ======================= zookeeper: image: confluentinc/cp-zookeeper:7.5.0 container_name: zookeeper environment: ZOOKEEPER_CLIENT_PORT: 2181 ports: - "2181:2181"
kafka: image: confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.5.0 container_name: kafka depends_on: - zookeeper ports: - "9092:9092" environment: KAFKA_BROKER_ID: 1 KAFKA_ZOOKEEPER_CONNECT: zookeeper:2181 KAFKA_ADVERTISED_LISTENERS: PLAINTEXT://kafka:9092 KAFKA_LISTENERS: PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092 KAFKA_OFFSETS_TOPIC_REPLICATION_FACTOR: 1 KAFKA_AUTO_CREATE_TOPICS_ENABLE: "true"
# ======================= # AUTH SERVICE # ======================= auth-service: build: context: . dockerfile: auth-service/Dockerfile container_name: auth-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8081:8081" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/authdb JWT_SECRET: your-secret-key EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # CATALOGUE SERVICE # ======================= catalogue-service: build: context: . dockerfile: catalogue-service/Dockerfile container_name: catalogue-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8082:8080" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/cataloguedb EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # TICKET SERVICE # ======================= ticket-service: build: context: . dockerfile: ticket-service/Dockerfile container_name: ticket-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8083:8080" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/ticketdb EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # PAYMENT SERVICE # ======================= payment-service: build: context: . dockerfile: payment-service/Dockerfile container_name: payment-service depends_on: mongodb: condition: service_started kafka: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy ports: - "8084:8080" environment: SPRING_DATA_MONGODB_URI: mongodb://mongodb:27017/paymentdb EUREKA_CLIENT_SERVICEURL_DEFAULTZONE: http://eureka-server:8761/eureka/ EUREKA_CLIENT_REGISTER_WITH_EUREKA: "true" EUREKA_CLIENT_FETCH_REGISTRY: "true"
# ======================= # NOTIFICATION SERVICE # ======================= notification-service: build: context: . dockerfile: notification-service/Dockerfile container_name: notification-service depends_on: - kafka ports: - "8085:8085"
# ======================= # API GATEWAY # ======================= api-gateway: build: context: . dockerfile: api-gateway/Dockerfile container_name: api-gateway depends_on: auth-service: condition: service_started eureka-server: condition: service_healthy catalogue-service: condition: service_started ticket-service: condition: service_started payment-service: condition: service_started ports: - "8080:8080"
volumes: mongo_data:

option.name: filePath
option.value: /pom (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.platform</groupId> <artifactId>catalogue-service</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> </parent>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> </properties>
<dependencies>
<!-- Web --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- MongoDB --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Validation --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Mongock --> <dependency> <groupId>io.mongock</groupId> <artifactId>mongock-springboot-v3</artifactId> <version>5.4.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.mongock</groupId> <artifactId>mongodb-springdata-v4-driver</artifactId> <version>5.4.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Eureka Client --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Lombok --> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<!-- Shared Common Module --> <dependency> <groupId>com.platform</groupId> <artifactId>common</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <!-- Spring Cloud BOM --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId> <version>2023.0.3</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.platform</groupId> <artifactId>catalogue-service</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> </parent>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> </properties>
<dependencies>
<!-- Web --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- MongoDB --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Validation --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Mongock --> <dependency> <groupId>io.mongock</groupId> <artifactId>mongock-springboot-v3</artifactId> <version>5.4.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.mongock</groupId> <artifactId>mongodb-springdata-v4-driver</artifactId> <version>5.4.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Eureka Client --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Lombok --> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency>
<!-- Shared Common Module --> <dependency> <groupId>com.platform</groupId> <artifactId>common</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <mainClass>com.platform.catalogue.CatalogueServiceApplication</mainClass> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <!-- Spring Cloud BOM --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId> <version>2023.0.3</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
</project>
